item.headline: Creative Direction | Venture Building | Brand Building | Production Design | Landscape Architecture
item.about:
Camille Cervantes is both a design-thinker and a systems-thinker, allowing her to be both creative in problem solving, and fast in learning and adapting. Even as she found her way into the tech industry, Cam is also a licensed Landscape Architect, a consulting creative director, and freelances as a film production designer. 

She was the lead for Creatives and Performance Marketing for the e-grocery platform Rappit (formerly PureGo), a joint-venture between 917Ventures and Puregold, having a pivotal role in the company's rebrand and its marketing campaigns. Afterwards, she was absorbed into Globe's 917Ventures' Ideation and Acceleration Group, working across different industries and verticals, focusing on growth with data-driven, tech-first innovations.

She was also the Lead Graphic Designer, Set Designer, and Set Decorator for the first season of the US TV Series, "Almost Paradise" by Electric Entertainment and ABS-CBN International, under the production design team of Bigbulb Design Lab, Inc. A Creative Director for Bigbulb's Branding Department, she works with various clients for ideations, activations, film, TVCs, and product development (Drag Den PH, Ben & Ben, discovery+, HBO GO, among others).

As a visual artist that primarily works with acrylic, Cervantes similarly explores the use of pen/ink, digital painting, spray paint, and photo manipulation in her works. In July 2019, her works were under the "DIOS (Among Us)" group exhibit held at the Arbilo Galerie (Paris, France). She was also a finalist in the 2nd season of Art Battle Manila in FringeMNL 2017, and a featured mural artist for the city-wide Makati Makisalo festival in FringeMNL 2018.

multiLocaleHeadline.headline: Creative Direction | Venture Building | Brand Building | Production Design | Landscape Architecture

experience.position: Lead Art Director (Employer Branding & HR Communications)

experience.companyName: De La Salle-College of Saint Benilde
experience.description: Guides Interior Design students in integrating plant systems into architectural spaces with a focus on aesthetics, wellness, and sustainability. My approach blends creative practice with data-driven strategy, helping students connect design concepts to real-world applications through studio work, critiques, and industry-linked projects.
Focuses on design solutions for planning public spaces, with pillars that seamlessly integrate ecosystem design, user-centric design, and community placemaking sensitive to the spirit of place.
Under the Production Design team of the movie Big Tiger (coming 2026)

Supports the company in shaping how enterprises understand, adopt, and scale AI, through creative marketing and storytelling, and sharing its mission in making AI usable, impactful, and human-centered.

• Develops and implements creative strategies that align with brand identities, leveraging storytelling to engage audiences and stay ahead of trends.
• Establishes guidelines for consistent brand representation, sets campaign directions, and collaborates with teams to align concepts with goals.
• Oversees quality control of all creative outputs to maintain high standards and brand consistency.
• Analyzes creative assets' effectiveness in performance marketing and ecommerce, using insights to optimize future creative efforts.

experience.position: Venture Builder - OIC (PetPal App & VetPal EMR)
experience.description:
- Responsible for identifying market opportunities, assembling high-performing teams, and helping steer the strategic direction (pivot from B2C to B2B (Vet) 2C)
- Combines strategic planning, operational oversight, and active involvement in daily activities
- Actively optimizing the marketing strategy and enhancing the product user experience

experience.position: Business Analytics & Brand Management - Ideation & Acceleration Group
experience.description:
• Led Data Activation efforts through Digital Campaigns to increase Share-of-Wallet within the Globe Ecosystem (across multiple Portfolio Companies and GlobeOne), together with the 917V Data Head and Proj NFX Team, which was recently awarded at the 2023 Globe Excellence Awards -- notable results include a 465% increase in CTR with a 74% decrease in CPC, and a ROAS of 32 vs a baseline of 4, among others.

• Strategized & provided creative direction for the brand presentation of each venture for business development, and seed pitches to the Investment Committee 

• Spearheaded the implementation of a consolidated CRM between seed ventures to streamline cross-selling efforts

Optimizes seed/venture processes and develops improved business strategies, including:
- managing & defining brand position and image
- strategizing lead generation efforts
- evaluating operations and finances
- validating strategies with implemented APM

experience.position: Creatives Lead & Performance Marketing co-Lead - Rappit
experience.description: Responsible for Creative Direction, working together with the Rappit Marketing Team to develop and implement from scratch the rebrand efforts of the company. Manages the creatives team for advertising and marketing efforts -- from conceptualization, strategy, and design, to production, implementation, and its subsequent performance and results of agile testing. As best practice, puts premium on ad creatives, data-driven decision making, and segmented audience targeting being key factors to optimized campaign performances.

A storyteller spearheading conceptualization and creative direction, manages a team of Art Directors, Copywriters, Content Strategists, and Graphic Artists to create, plan, pitch, and deliver a strategic vision for clients, for the implementation of Bigbulb's Production Team.

Led multidisciplinary teams in developing creative concepts for film, TV, eComm, branding, digital advertising, and OOH advertising, translated client visions into compelling designs, ensuring quality and adherence to deadlines, and recognized for launching successful projects, optimizing workflows, and building strong client relationships.

Set Decorator & Graphic Designer (Manilennials Digital Series)

volunteering.description: Worked in Tangier, Morocco under the Drawing Smiles project -- conducted art therapy for students with mental disabilities, and in culmination created a wall art piece for the school made out of recycled materials. She also represented the Philippines in cultural discourse and presentations asked of her during the volunteer experience.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Driving Strategy, Experience, and Business Growth | Retail, F&B, FMCG, E-Commerce
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: April 7, 2023, Angelica managed Camille Cassandra directly
receivedRecommendations.description:
As Camille Cervates' supervisor in the marketing department at Rappit, I have had the privilege of working closely with her for the past 1.5 years. With her keen eye for detail and her innovative approach to creative development, Camille quickly rose through the ranks and was promoted to the managerial position of Creative Lead after just a few months.

Camille's strengths are many, but three areas in particular stand out to me. Firstly, her storytelling abilities have led to the development of several successful marketing campaigns that have significantly increased conversion rates throughout the customer funnel. Camille has a unique talent for crafting visual narratives that resonate with our target audience and drive engagement with our brand. Secondly, Camille is a skilled strategist with an eye for identifying opportunities for growth and expansion. She has played a pivotal role in the development of our marketing strategy, helping to shape our approach and ensuring that our campaigns align with our broader business goals.

Lastly, Camille is a talented manager who places a strong emphasis on simplifying processes for her team. Her management style is characterized by clear communication, strong leadership, and a commitment to empowering her team members to reach their full potential. Camille has developed streamlined workflows and processes that have enabled her team to work more efficiently and effectively. Her dedication to excellence and her ability to manage a team of three with ease have been instrumental in driving the success of our marketing campaigns.

In summary, Camille Cervantes' multifaceted abilities, coupled with her expertise in creative development, storytelling, strategy development, and team management, make her a standout talent. Her passion for learning and willingness to take on new challenges have enabled her to excel in diverse areas of our company. Camille Cervantes is a hard talent to miss and I strongly endorse her for any future endeavors.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Business Communications Specialist @ Aidea | Adjunct Professor @ Enderun Colleges | Creativity and Innovation
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: January 19, 2023, Raph worked with Camille Cassandra on the same team
receivedRecommendations.description: Working with Camille in various roles and projects has been dynamic and highly collaborative. Her broad interests helped immensely in our brainstorming - coming up with interesting pitches that shaped the discourse. Truly easy to work with, she keeps her cool under pressure and is always ready to lend a hand to co-workers and colleagues.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: January 18, 2023, Jamie worked with Camille Cassandra on the same team
receivedRecommendations.description: Camille's proven track record in Production Design, combined with her academic background in Architecture, makes her an excellent creative who is able to synthesize aesthetics and strategy to form effective, high-impact designs. She displays great leadership skills, capable of leading her team with confidence and empathy. I reported to Cam as my project manager on some freelance projects we worked on in the past, and in all endeavors I can claim how well she consistently pays incredible attention to detail and is able to intuit the needs of clients above and beyond the briefs provided.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: January 17, 2023, Veronica worked with Camille Cassandra on the same team
receivedRecommendations.description:
Creativity goes beyond a designer's tool and the idea limit does not exist--Cam's ability to understand and translate strategies into key visuals has resulted in successful campaigns, effective lead generation, and a distinctive brand identity. She played an impactful role in PureGo's rebrand initiative to Rappit, leading the creative direction of the new brand, and ensuring that the vision and plan materialized successfully. Aside from being a strong creative force, Cam is a versatile co-worker who is now leading the Digital Team with me--from planning to analytics. 

As a team leader, Cam is approachable and encouraging. She makes sure that her team's creative challenges are addressed and creative juices are recharged -- a work culture that would make anyone want to work with her or be part of the team.
